projectDescription: An AI-native terminal for macOS, Linux, and Windows that integrates multi-provider AI assistance, persistent SSH sessions, agentic tools (web browser, database manager, API manager), and a customizable widget workspace.
keyFeatures: Multi-provider AI support (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, Ollama, LM Studio)
Persistent long-term memory system (Gulin Brain) with Auto-RAG and local embeddings
Agentic web browser with DOM interaction and user-in-the-loop safety
Native database connections (Oracle, PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, SQLite, Dremio)
API Manager for secure credential and endpoint management
Drag-and-drop tiled workspace with resizable blocks
Durable SSH sessions that survive network interruptions
Interactive dashboards with recharts (bar, line, area, pie, radar, composed, grid)
AI command completion via # + TAB in the terminal prompt
Rewind & Merge agentic interruption for mid-task course correction
GulinApp SDK (Tsunami framework) for building custom terminal micro-apps
Real-time debug logs widget with per-category filtering
Context-optimized sliding window memory for token efficiency
Hot-switching between AI models without losing chat history
publicApiSurface: wsh ai — send a message to the GuLiN AI from the terminal
wsh run — execute a command in a block
wsh ssh — open an SSH connection
wsh setmeta — set block metadata key-value pairs
wsh getmeta — get block metadata
wsh setconfig — update settings key-value pairs
wsh editconfig — open the settings file in the editor
wsh file / wsh readfile / wsh writefile — file operations
wsh getvar / wsh setvar — manage block-scoped variables
wsh createblock / wsh deleteblock / wsh focusblock — manage workspace blocks
wsh secret — manage secrets in the secret store
wsh notify — send a desktop notification
wsh setbg — set the window background
apimanager_list — list registered external API services
apimanager_call — make HTTP calls to registered services
apimanager_register — register a new API endpoint
apimanager_delete — remove an API endpoint
brain_update — save new knowledge to Gulin Brain
brain_list — list all Gulin Brain memory entries
brain_search — semantic vector search over Gulin Brain
StreamGulinAiCommand — Go RPC interface method to stream AI responses
WshRpcInterface — Go interface defining all backend RPC commands
